scripts.test:project-projection: tsc --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --target ES2020 --lib ES2020,DOM --strict --skipLibCheck --esModuleInterop --outDir /tmp/mlj-project-projection-test src/lib/project-projection.test.ts && node /tmp/mlj-project-projection-test/lib/project-projection.test.js
scripts.test:project-snapshot-api: tsc --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --target ES2020 --lib ES2020,DOM --strict --skipLibCheck --esModuleInterop --outDir /tmp/mlj-project-snapshot-api-test src/lib/project-snapshot-api.test.ts && node /tmp/mlj-project-snapshot-api-test/lib/project-snapshot-api.test.js
